extortion.description: PCT International Inc. is a privately owned company serving a segment of the global telecommunications infrastructure. The Company manufactures coaxial cable and connectors with its proprietary technology for homes and businesses. PCT International serves customers worldwide.SITE: www.pctinternational.com Address : PCT International, Inc. at Arizona State Research Park 7855 S. River Parkway, Suite 222. Tempe, AZ 85284. USA. Tel# 480.813.0925ALL DATA SIZE: ~ 700gb 1. Users data (personal employees documents +) 2. HR 3. Finance data 4. Personal and departments data, confidential data & etc…
